reasoning: The question asks for the probability that the daily average temperature at Saint-Girons will be higher on the resolution date(s) than on 2025-10-26. While the specific list of resolution dates was omitted from the prompt, the close date of the question is 2026-01-24, placing the timeline in winter. October 26th in Saint-Girons typically has a daily average temperature around 12°C. The average temperature in November, December, and January is significantly lower, typically between 5°C and 9°C. Due to seasonal cooling, any comparison between deep winter temperatures and late October temperatures heavily biases the late October day to be warmer. Assuming typical variance in weather patterns (standard deviations roughly 3-4°C), the probability of a winter day's mean temperature exceeding a late October day's is generally low (~10-15%). Thus, 12% is a reasonable estimate representing the low chance of unseasonable warmth during the winter date overriding typical October levels.
